NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MORLEY JEFFREY D.D.S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES MARILOU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORLEY JEFFREY D.D.S. PLTFF'S EVIDENCE INSUFFICIENT TO PROVE MALPRACTICE AND CAUSATION. JUDGM. ENTERED IN #23641 5-9-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
